title: Design Science Research project and module authoring schema
description: Validates full DSR project records and the module-root YAML templates generated from the DSR ontology, SHACL profile, SKOS vocabulary, and concept inventory.

dsr_genre.description: DSR genre value from the operational extraction profile.

claim_disposition.description: Result disposition for a claim or finding.

source_anchor_ref_array.description: Source citation anchor IDs supporting the claim.

ontology_mapping.description: Optional mapping to ontology, SKOS, SHACL, or schema terms.

transparency_section.description: Transparency section. The SHACL profile recommends covering all six transparency forms and all six DSR Grid dimensions.
